feasibility.evidence: All 26 target files confirmed via hivexplorer investigation. Write side: 8 active + 4 dead code files exist. Read side: 7 parser + 4 classifier + 3 writer files exist. Infrastructure: 6 files exist.

constraints.resource_limits: Each phase ≤5 files, single concern. TDD enforced. Gate after each phase.
constraints.timeline: 13 phases, estimated 4 parallel waves, critical path length 10

functional: R-F1: File naming — use SDK session ID directly, not semantic name
R-F2: Header — 3 fields only (Session ID, Created, Updated), human-readable dates
R-F3: Tool input — use actual args JSON, not callID
R-F4: Tool output — use output.output, not output.title
R-F5: Model — extract from injection payload
R-F6: Duration — measure between before/after hooks
R-F7: Noise — skip Error/Diagnostics/Idle sections in markdown
R-F8: Subsessions — embedded in main session markdown via Tool:task with task_result wrapper
non_functional: R-NF1: TDD — write failing tests first, then implement
R-NF2: Incremental processing — triggered after each main session assistant message + user prompt
R-NF3: Gatekeeping — typecheck + test + build gates after each phase
integration: R-I1: Wire parser to read new turns from markdown after each write
R-I2: Wire classifier to classify events in parsed turns
R-I3: Wire synthesizer to update session synthesis incrementally
R-I4: Wire index-writer to update cross-session index
R-I5: Consolidate path authority — single source of truth (paths.ts)
R-I6: Unify error-log format — one format, not two
R-I7: Main session only — subsessions don't get own processing
risk_compliance: R-RC1: Remove deprecated writer chain (session-writer, events-writer, diagnostics-writer, session-writers)
R-RC2: Remove SessionV2 — keep only V3

phases.concern: infrastructure — consolidate path authority to paths.ts
phases.description: Verify paths.ts is the single path authority. Update session-structure.ts to derive all paths from paths.ts. Remove any path duplication. Ensure getConsolidatedSessionPath uses SDK session ID pattern.
subtasks: Audit paths.ts for duplicate path generation logic
Ensure session-structure.ts imports from paths.ts, not computes paths inline
Add getSdkSessionPath() if needed for direct SDK ID mapping

phases.description: Remove the entire deprecated writer chain. First update hivemind-journal.ts to stop importing createSessionWriters from internal/session-writers.ts. Route it to consolidated-writer or mark as non-write tool. Then delete the 4 deprecated files.
subtasks: Update hivemind-journal.ts: remove import of createSessionWriters, route to consolidated-writer or disable write path
Delete src/internal/session-writers.ts
Delete src/features/event-tracker/writers/session-writer.ts
Delete src/features/event-tracker/writers/events-writer.ts
Delete src/features/event-tracker/writers/diagnostics-writer.ts

phases.concern: risk — remove SessionV2, keep only V3
phases.description: Remove SessionV2 interface and all V2-specific types from types.ts. Keep SessionV3 as the canonical schema. Update any type exports that reference V2. Reduce types.ts from 366 LOC to under 300.
subtasks: Identify all SessionV2 references in types.ts
Remove SessionV2 interface
Verify SessionV3 has all needed fields
Update exports

phases.concern: write — refactor consolidated-writer.ts to V3-only with SDK ID naming
phases.description: Remove SessionV2 from consolidated-writer.ts. Use SDK session ID directly for file naming (not semantic name). Remove createSdkSymlink(). Reduce LOC from 665 to under 300 by extracting helpers. All session paths use getConsolidatedSessionPath with SDK ID.
subtasks: Remove SessionV2 interface and all V2 code paths
Remove createSdkSymlink function
Use SDK session ID directly in initSession/initSessionV3
Extract helper functions to reduce LOC below 300
Update tests for V3-only behavior

phases.description: Rewrite markdown header to 3 fields (Session ID, Created, Updated) with human-readable dates. Extract model from injection payload. Implement duration measurement. Skip Error/Diagnostics/Idle sections. Reduce LOC from 545 to under 300.
subtasks: Rewrite header format: Session ID, Created (human date), Updated (human date)
Extract model name from injection payload in appendTurnToMarkdown
Add duration calculation from before/after hook timestamps
Skip Error, Diagnostics, Idle sections in markdown generation
Update tests for new format

phases.concern: write — fix tool input/output in tool execution handler
phases.description: Fix tool input to use actual args JSON (not callID). Fix tool output to use output.output (not output.title). Update both tool-execution-handler.ts and text-complete-handler.ts.
subtasks: Update tool-execution-handler.ts: use args JSON for input, output.output for output
Update text-complete-handler.ts: extract model from injection payload, fix output mapping
Add tests for correct field extraction

phases.concern: write — update event handler for duration, lifecycle
phases.description: Update event-handler.ts to track session lifecycle timestamps for duration measurement. Capture before/after hook timestamps. Pass timing data to markdown-writer. Reduce LOC from 608 to under 300.
subtasks: Add timestamp capture at session start/end events
Pass timing data through to consolidated-writer and markdown-writer
Extract helper functions to reduce LOC
Remove Error/Diagnostics event handling (noise)

phases.concern: write — update chat and compaction handlers
phases.description: Update chat-message-handler and compaction-handler for new markdown format. Handle subsession embedding in main session markdown. Remove symlink creation from session-resolver.ts.
subtasks: Update chat-message-handler.ts for new header/format expectations
Update compaction-handler.ts for new format
Remove createSdkSymlink call from session-resolver.ts
Handle subsession events as embedded Tool:task with task_result wrapper

phases.concern: integration — update classifier to not import deprecated writers
phases.description: Update writer-adapter.ts to stop importing SessionEventWriteInput from deprecated events-writer.ts. Map to consolidated-writer types instead. Update event-classifier.ts if needed.
subtasks: Remove import of SessionEventWriteInput from events-writer.js in writer-adapter.ts
Map EventEntry to consolidated-writer input format
Update event-classifier.ts if it references deprecated types

phases.description: Wire the read-side pipeline to run incrementally after each main session turn. After markdown write completes: parse new turns → classify events → update synthesis → update index. Main session only — skip for subsessions.
subtasks: Add read-side trigger after markdown write in text-complete-handler
Wire parser to parse new turns from updated markdown
Wire classifier to classify parsed events
Wire synthesizer to incrementally update session synthesis
Wire index-writer to update cross-session index
Gate: main session only (skip subsessions)

phases.description: Remove symlink-related code from session-resolver.ts. Simplify to pure SDK session ID resolution without semantic name mapping.
subtasks: Remove createSdkSymlink import and usage
Remove semantic name resolution logic
Simplify to direct SDK ID → path mapping

phases.description: Unify error-log format between error-log-writer.ts and any diagnostic writing in event-handler.ts. Single format, single writer.
subtasks: Audit current error-log format in error-log-writer.ts
Audit diagnostic format in event-handler.ts
Unify to single format
Remove duplicate error-writing paths

phases.gate: npx tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run build
phases.description: Full integration verification. Run typecheck, all tests, and build. Verify no regressions. Verify all deprecated code is removed. Verify read-side pipeline runs incrementally.
subtasks: Run npx tsc --noEmit — zero errors
Run npm test — all tests pass
Run npm run build — build succeeds
Verify no imports of deprecated files remain
Verify read-side pipeline triggers after write

parallel_waves.rationale: All three have zero dependencies. Infrastructure changes that don't touch each other's files.
Depends on all wave 1 phases. Single phase, sequential.
Both depend on phase 04 only. No shared files between them. Parallel safe.
07 depends on 05. 08 depends on 05. 09 depends on 02. All can run in parallel — no shared mutable files.
10 depends on 07+08+09. 11 depends on 01+04. Can run in parallel.
Final gate. Depends on all implementation phases.

edges.rationale: read-side wiring depends on final markdown format
read-side wiring depends on hook handler updates
error-log unification depends on event-handler cleanup

carry_forward: consolidated-writer.ts is 665 LOC — must be split/delegated below 300
event-handler.ts is 608 LOC — must be split/delegated below 300
markdown-writer.ts is 545 LOC — must be split/delegated below 300
classifier/writer-adapter.ts is the ONLY read→write bridge — must update its import after dead code removal
hivemind-journal.ts is the sole consumer of deprecated session-writers.ts — must update before deletion
